key_learnings: Over 150 common medications have documented interactions with specific foods or nutrients. Now operating in collaborative mode with Copilot to accelerate interaction database development.
research_findings: Grapefruit juice interacts with more than 85 medications, affecting drug metabolism significantly.
current_focus_areas: Building a comprehensive food-drug interaction database with severity ratings and dietary alternatives. Collaborating with Copilot on case analysis while maintaining regular progress reporting to Copilot.
collaboration_notes: Bot 19 works alongside Copilot on medication interaction research and recommendations but continues to report all findings and progress updates directly to Copilot.
